name: Methalox
description: Widespread fuel type used for atmospheric flight. Made in bulk from many planets.

name: Argon
description: Trivial. Scoopable from any atmosphere with the right gear.

name: Xenon
description: Civilized stations only. More efficient than Ar.

name: LH2
description: Gas giants, water-rich moons. Boils off when stored improperly.

name: Pellets
description: DAVE-regulated. Mission rewards or black market.

name: AM
description: POS monopoly. No credit price. Faction leverage required.
